title: BriefMatrix Tenant Config
description: Per-tenant configuration for the BriefMatrix runtime.

id.description: Stable tenant slug; matches the directory name under tenants/.

source_registry.description: Path relative to the tenant directory.

spec_ledger_ref.description: Path relative to the tenant directory.

voice_overrides.description: Optional path to per-tenant voice overrides.

review_target.description: Where the publisher renders an approved brief.
